title: Operational Excellence & Strategy Manager (m/w/d)
required_skills: Above-average Master's degree in business administration, economics, engineering or comparable field — ideally from a renowned university
Several years of experience in a Top Tier 1 or Tier 2 strategy consulting firm (e.g. MBB or Tier-2), or comparable high-dynamic environment with clear track record in strategic and operational topics
Entrepreneurial and strategic thinking: structured complex problem solving, pragmatic solutions
End-to-end project ownership and data-driven working style
Excellent PowerPoint and Excel skills for management presentations and complex models
Fluent German and English at minimum C1 level
Strong communication, executive presence, and stakeholder management
bonus_skills: Experience with Power BI or comparable BI tools
M&A, due diligence, or corporate finance touchpoints
First experience with AI tool integration
matched_skills: Master of Management & Entrepreneurship (Leuphana) — satisfies degree requirement
Fluent English (C1) — satisfies English C1 requirement
Stakeholder management and C-level reporting: HSBC programme interface across C-suite, Product, Engineering, Marketing — satisfies stakeholder management requirement
End-to-end project coordination and data-driven reporting at HSBC and Hapag-Lloyd — partial match for project ownership requirement
Executive PowerPoint and presentation skills: sprint review reports, town halls, C-suite escalation at HSBC — satisfies PowerPoint/communication requirement
Power BI (PL-300 certified) — directly satisfies BI tools bonus requirement
AI tool usage (ChatGPT, Claude) mentioned in CV — partial match for AI tools bonus
missing_skills: No strategy consulting background (MBB or Tier-2) — this is the core required experience; the JD explicitly calls for this
German B1 falls short of the required C1 minimum — this is flagged explicitly in the JD
No track record in strategic transformation, operational excellence, or Lean/process improvement methodologies
No hypothesis-driven problem structuring or management consulting analytical frameworks
No M&A or corporate finance experience
core_responsibilities: Develop and drive strategic initiatives end-to-end; translate strategy into operational implementation
Analyse and optimise processes across the entire value chain; identify efficiency and quality levers
Conduct deep data analyses and derive clear, actionable recommendations
Accompany change and transformation processes; foster continuous improvement culture
Work closely with leadership team; prepare C-level decision templates; present results to management
recommended_emphasis: The German C1 gap is a hard disqualifier as stated explicitly — flag to the candidate before applying
Highlight the HSBC C-suite interface, USD 8M programme governance, and multi-workstream coordination as the strongest evidence of operational strategy work
Lead with Power BI PL-300 certification for the BI bonus requirement
If applying speculatively, frame the Hapag-Lloyd and HSBC experience as internal strategy execution and operational excellence rather than external consulting
summary: Weak match at 38.9%. The role explicitly requires strategy consulting background (MBB/Tier-2) and German at C1 level — both hard requirements the candidate does not meet. The candidate's PMO and programme governance experience demonstrates some strategic execution capability, and the Power BI certification covers the BI bonus. However, without a consulting pedigree and with German B1 explicitly disqualifying, this is a high-risk application. Not recommended unless the candidate can demonstrate a compelling alternative narrative.
